feats.name: Alert
feats.description: Always on the lookout for danger, you gain +5 to initiative, can't be surprised while conscious, and hidden creatures gain no advantage on attacks against you.
benefits: No hidden-creature advantage on attacks vs. you

feats.name: Lucky
feats.description: You have inexplicable luck. You have 3 luck points per long rest. When you make an attack, ability check, or saving throw you can spend a luck point to roll an additional d20 and choose which to use. You can also spend a luck point when an enemy attacks you to impose disadvantage on that roll.
benefits: Impose disadvantage on attacks against you

feats.name: Sentinel
feats.description: You've mastered the techniques to take advantage of every drop in any enemy's guard. When you hit a creature with an opportunity attack, its speed drops to 0. Creatures provoke opportunity attacks even when they Disengage. When a creature within 5 ft hits a target other than you, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against that creature.
benefits: Reaction attack when ally is attacked nearby

feats.name: Great Weapon Master
feats.description: You've learned to put the weight of a weapon to your advantage. On a crit or killing blow with a heavy melee weapon, you can make one bonus action attack. You can also choose -5 to attack roll for +10 damage on heavy melee weapon attacks.
benefits: Bonus attack on crit or kill (heavy weapons)

feats.name: Sharpshooter
feats.description: You have mastered ranged weapons and can make shots that others find impossible. Attacking at long range doesn't impose disadvantage. Ranged weapon attacks ignore half cover and three-quarters cover. You can choose -5 to attack roll for +10 damage.

feats.name: Polearm Master
feats.description: You can keep your enemies at bay with reach weapons. Bonus action attack with the butt end of a glaive, halberd, quarterstaff, or spear (1d4 bludgeoning). Creatures entering your reach provoke an opportunity attack.
benefits: OA when enemy enters your reach

feats.name: War Caster
feats.description: Practical experience in battle has honed your spellcasting. Advantage on CON saves to maintain concentration. Can perform somatic components with hands full. Can cast a spell instead of making an opportunity attack.

feats.name: Resilient
feats.description: Choose one ability score. You gain +1 to that ability score (max 20) and gain proficiency in saving throws using that ability. Most commonly taken as Resilient (CON) for concentration or Resilient (WIS) for mind effects.
benefits: Proficiency in that ability's saving throw

feats.name: Crossbow Expert
feats.description: Thanks to extensive practice, you ignore the loading quality of crossbows. Being within 5 feet of a hostile creature doesn't impose disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls. When you use the Attack action with a one-handed weapon, you can use a bonus action to attack with a loaded hand crossbow.
benefits: No disadvantage in melee with ranged attacks

feats.name: Telekinetic
feats.description: You learn the Mage Hand cantrip or increase INT/WIS/CHA by 1. Your Mage Hand is invisible and has extended range (30 ft). As a bonus action, you can telekinetically shove one creature within 30 ft (STR save or move 5 ft in a direction you choose).
benefits: Bonus action shove 5 ft (no attack required)

feats.name: Fey Touched
feats.description: +1 to INT, WIS, or CHA. Learn Misty Step and one 1st-level spell from Divination or Enchantment school. Can cast each once per long rest for free, or using spell slots.

feats.name: Shadow Touched
feats.description: +1 to INT, WIS, or CHA. Learn Invisibility and one 1st-level Illusion or Necromancy spell. Each can be cast once per long rest for free.

feats.name: Elven Accuracy
feats.description: +1 to DEX, INT, WIS, or CHA. Whenever you have advantage on an attack with a finesse or ranged weapon using those stats, you can reroll one die — triple advantage effectively.
benefits: Reroll one die when attacking with advantage (finesse/ranged)

feats.name: Tough
feats.description: Your hit point maximum increases by an amount equal to twice your level when you gain this feat. Whenever you gain a level thereafter, your HP maximum increases by an additional 2.

feats.name: Mage Slayer
feats.description: When a creature within 5 feet casts a spell, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against it. When you damage a spellcaster, it has disadvantage on concentration saves. Advantage on saving throws against spells from creatures within 5 feet.
benefits: Reaction melee attack when nearby creature casts
Advantage on saves from nearby spellcasters

feats.name: Mounted Combatant
feats.description: You are a dangerous foe to face while mounted. Advantage on melee attacks against unmounted creatures smaller than your mount. Force attack targeting your mount to target you instead. Your mount takes no damage on successful DEX saves, half on failures.
benefits: Advantage on melee attacks vs. smaller unmounted creatures
Mount takes 0 damage on DEX save success

feats.name: Shield Master
feats.description: If you take the Attack action, you can use a bonus action to try to shove a creature within 5 feet with your shield. Add shield's +2 to Dexterity saving throws for half damage. Use reaction to take no damage on a successful DEX save instead of half.

feats.name: Skilled
feats.description: You gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools of your choice. Simple but highly flexible — excellent for filling gaps in party knowledge.
benefits: Proficiency in 3 skills or tools of your choice

feats.name: Actor
feats.description: +1 CHA (max 20). Advantage on Deception and Performance checks when pretending to be someone else. Can mimic voices or speech patterns of creatures heard for at least 1 minute.

feats.name: Dual Wielder
feats.description: +1 AC while wielding two melee weapons. Can use two-weapon fighting with non-light melee weapons. Can draw or stow two weapons when you would normally draw or stow one.

feats.name: Mobile
feats.description: +10 ft movement speed. Difficult terrain doesn't cost extra movement when Dashing. When you make a melee attack against a creature, you don't provoke opportunity attacks from it for the rest of your turn (hit or miss).
benefits: No extra cost for difficult terrain when Dashing
No OA from attacked creature this turn

feats.name: Inspiring Leader
feats.description: Spend 10 minutes inspiring companions. Up to 6 friendly creatures who can see and hear you gain temporary HP equal to your level + CHA modifier. Refreshes on short or long rest.
benefits: 6 allies gain temp HP (level + CHA mod)
Refreshes on short or long rest

feats.name: Grappler
feats.description: Advantage on attack rolls against creatures you're grappling. Can use an action to try to pin a grappled creature — both become restrained until the grapple ends.
benefits: Advantage on attacks vs. grappled creatures

feats.name: Magic Initiate
feats.description: Choose a class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard. Learn two cantrips and one 1st-level spell from that class's list. Cast the 1st-level spell once per long rest without a slot.

feats.name: Ritual Caster
feats.description: Choose a class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard. Acquire a ritual book with two 1st-level rituals from that class. Can copy ritual spells found in the world into the book.

feats.name: Gift of the Chromatic Dragon
feats.description: Chromatic Infusion: as a bonus action, touch a simple or martial weapon, infuse it with acid/cold/fire/lightning/poison for 1 minute (1d4 extra damage of chosen type). 1/long rest. Reactive Skin: as a reaction when taking acid/cold/fire/lightning/poison damage, gain resistance to that type for the rest of that turn.
benefits: Bonus action: add 1d4 elemental damage to weapon (1/long rest)
Reaction: gain resistance to triggering element

feats.name: Tavern Brawler
feats.description: +1 STR or CON. Proficient with improvised weapons. Unarmed strikes deal 1d4 damage. When you hit with an unarmed strike or improvised weapon, you can use a bonus action to attempt to grapple the target.
benefits: Bonus action grapple on unarmed/improvised hit

feats.name: Aberrant Dragonmark
feats.description: You have an aberrant dragonmark. Learn one cantrip and one 1st-level spell from the sorcerer list. Cast the 1st-level spell with this feat once per long rest. Constitution is your spellcasting ability. Each time you cast using this feat, roll a d6: on a 1, you deal force damage equal to your level to nearby creatures.
benefits: Possible explosive surge on roll of 1
